common.filePathUnavailable: Cannot get the real file path. Please pick a local file using the native file picker
common.outputFileHint: If left empty, the output file will be saved in the source file directory with an auto-generated name
common.outputDirHintMulti: If left empty, a new folder will be created in the source file directory to save results
common.outputDirHintStrong: Tip: If left empty, files will be saved automatically in the source file directory

preview.empty: Pick a file and set options to see a real preview

merge.title: Merge PDF
merge.desc: Combine multiple PDF files into one

reorder.title: Reorder Pages
reorder.desc: Show all PDF pages and drag cards to change page order
reorder.dragHint: Drag on desktop, or use Move Up/Down on mobile
reorder.empty: Select a PDF file to load page previews
reorder.pickFileFirst: Please select a PDF file first
reorder.noPages: No pages loaded. Please reselect the file

split.title: Split PDF
split.desc: Split a PDF by page or range
split.outputDirHint: If left empty, a new folder will be created in the source file directory to save split results

watermark.title: Add Watermark
watermark.desc: Add text or image watermark to each page

pageNumbers.title: Add Page Numbers
pageNumbers.desc: Add page numbers to each page

toDocx.title: PDF to Word
toDocx.desc: Convert PDF to an editable Word document

convert.title: Document Conversion
convert.pdfToWordUsesGlm: GLM API Key detected. Cloud mode can improve recognition for complex layouts.
convert.pdfToWordFallbackLocal: No GLM API Key detected. It will use local pdf2docx.
convert.wordToMarkdownUsesGlm: GLM API Key detected: Word to Markdown always follows Word→PDF→Markdown, then prefers GLM for PDF recognition.
convert.wordToMarkdownFallbackLocal: No GLM API Key detected: Word to Markdown always follows Word→PDF→Markdown, then uses local PDF extraction.
convert.markdownExtractImages: Extract images (on: output folder with sibling img directory)
convert.pdfToMarkdownUsesGlm: GLM API key detected: PDF to Markdown will prefer GLM-OCR.
convert.pdfToMarkdownFallbackLocal: No GLM API key detected: PDF to Markdown will use local extraction (configure a key in Settings to enable GLM-OCR).
convert.glmCloudNotice: This feature can call the GLM-OCR cloud service; configure the GLM API Key in Settings first.
convert.anyToImagesDefault: Documents and PDFs are exported page by page by default; output supports PNG/JPG/WEBP.
convert.imageNeedFiles: Please select at least one file
convert.imageCapabilityMissing: Optional dependencies missing; some formats may be unavailable
convert.imageCapabilityUnknown: Environment capability check failed. If conversion fails, please verify dependencies
convert.libreofficeNote: Note: Word/Excel/PPT to PDF uses LibreOffice (layout-preserving); Markdown/HTML to PDF still uses Pandoc/rendering engines

audio.title: Audio Conversion
audio.needBatchFiles: Please select at least one file
audio.directionNote: Phase 1 supports audio↔audio and video/container→audio (audio→video is not included).
audio.batchNoSuccess: Batch finished with no successful outputs
audio.errorNoAudioStream: This file has no audio track and cannot be converted to audio. Please choose a video or audio file that contains sound.
audio.errorGeneric: Audio conversion failed. Please check the input file and parameters, then try again.

ncm.title: NCM Conversion
ncm.needBatchFiles: Please select at least one .ncm file
ncm.directionNote: Decode NetEase NCM files and convert to MP3/FLAC.
ncm.batchNoSuccess: Batch finished with no successful outputs
ncm.errorGeneric: NCM conversion failed. Please check the input file and try again.

kgm.title: KuGou Encrypted Audio Conversion
kgm.needBatchFiles: Please select at least one .kgm/.kgma/.kgg file
kgm.directionNote: Decode KuGou encrypted audio (KGM/KGMA/KGG) and convert to MP3/FLAC.
kgm.batchNoSuccess: Batch finished with no successful outputs
kgm.errorGeneric: KuGou encrypted audio conversion failed. Please check the input files and parameters, then try again.

unlock.title: Unified Music Unlock
unlock.kwmCoreKeyOptional: KWM core key (optional, required by some .kwm files; supports 32-char text or 64-char hex)
unlock.jooxUuidOptional: JOOX UUID (optional, required for .ofl_en only, 32 chars)
unlock.needSingleFile: Please select an encrypted audio file (e.g. .ncm / .uc / .kgm / .kwm / .qmc0 / .mflac / .tm0 / .xm / .mg3d)
unlock.needBatchFiles: Please select at least one encrypted audio file
unlock.directionNote: Unified unlock: supports NetEase NCM/UC, KuGou KGM/KGMA/KGG/VPR, KuWo KWM, QQ Music QMCv1/QMCv2/TM, Xiami XM, Ximalaya X2M/X3M, and Migu MG3D. It auto-detects formats and converts to MP3/FLAC.
unlock.batchNoSuccess: Batch finished with no successful outputs
unlock.errorGeneric: Music unlock failed. Please check the input file and parameters, then try again.

video.title: Video Conversion
video.codecHint: Detected available encoders: video {{video}}, audio {{audio}}. Unavailable or incompatible options are disabled automatically.
video.needBatchFiles: Please select at least one video file
video.directionNote: Supported format conversions: webm, mkv, mp4, ogv, avi, gif, 3gp, 3gpp, bik, flv, m4v, mpg, mpeg, mov, rm, ts, vob, wmv.
video.invalidFps: FPS must be a number greater than or equal to 0
video.batchNoSuccess: Batch finished with no successful outputs
video.errorGeneric: Video conversion failed. Please check the input file and parameters, then try again.

ocr.title: Document Text Recognition
ocr.glmNoticeReady: GLM-OCR is selected and a GLM API Key is available, so cloud recognition is ready.
ocr.glmNoticeMissing: GLM-OCR is selected but no GLM API Key is configured, so cloud recognition cannot start.
ocr.glmNoticeDescription: GLM-OCR sends images or PDFs to a cloud model. Configure the API Key in Settings first.

ocr.title: Cloud OCR Config
ocr.hint: API keys are stored locally and never uploaded
ocr.glmUsage: This GLM API key is used for GLM-OCR in Document OCR, PDF to Markdown, PDF to Word, and Word to Markdown cloud recognition.
ocr.glmNoticeDescription: These features can call the GLM-OCR cloud service: Document OCR, PDF to Markdown, PDF to Word, and Word to Markdown. Without a key, related cloud modes are unavailable or fall back to local processing.
ocr.jooxUuidPlaceholder: Enter a 32-char UUID (only needed for .ofl_en unlock)
ocr.jooxUsage: This UUID is only used for JOOX .ofl_en in Unified Music Unlock and is stored locally.

python.title: Python Path
python.hint: Leave empty to use default (project venv)
